title: Packhub
description: A amazing mod that lets you use the packs created by a awesome community!
body:
PackHub is a Fabric client-side mod that:

Opens an in‑game hub so you don’t browse the web to find texture packs — open it from the title menu, pause menu, or a configurable keybinding.
Lists community packs with search, filters, previews, starred favourites, download progress, multi-downloads, optional download verification.
Applies packs the normal Minecraft way — after download they show up alongside your other texture packs so you enable and order them yourself.
Pack Builder: pick vanilla items/blocks/particles, map texture names for the builder/export flow, peek your inventory while mapping, bundle a pack skeleton.
Pack Editor: change the shown pack title, tweak per-texture “replaces vanilla id” overrides, reload lists per category.
Feather tooling: browse local Feather profiles and import/export community Feather-style profiles when the backend supports them.
Cosmetic Kill FX: simple full-screen flashes tied to configurable effects, or disable entirely.
Server connection uses auto-discovery plus an override in Settings when you need full control.
